name: Qwen-14B
license: Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT (custom, free commercial use below usage threshold)
note: Mid-size Gen-1 dense model on 3T tokens, released two months after the 7B; native 2K context extendable to 8K.

results.notes: 4-shot; from Qwen base-model comparison table on HF/GitHub README
LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id qwen/qwen-14b-chat, default prompt strategy

Qwen Technical Report (Bai et al., 2023), Table 13 MMLU subcategory breakdown, STEM column, 5-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 37). Not previously tracked; only the overall MMLU average was in the corpus.
Qwen Technical Report, Table 15 ("Results on the other datasets of examination"), AGIEval column, zero-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 38).
Qwen Technical Report, Table 15, ARC-e column, zero-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 38).

Qwen Technical Report, Table 15, ARC-c column, zero-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 38). Distinct from the model's existing gpqa/mmlu entries -- this is a new benchmark slug for this model.
Qwen Technical Report, Table 16 ("knowledge and understanding"), LAMBADA column, zero-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 39).
Qwen Technical Report, Table 17 ("natural language reasoning"), HellaSwag column, zero-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 39).
Qwen Technical Report, Table 17, PIQA column, zero-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 39).
Qwen Technical Report, Table 17, SIQA (Social IQA) column, zero-shot. Confirmed via direct read of the PDF (page 39).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, released 2023-09-25 per GitHub README. 14B params confirmed. Context length double-checked against raw config.json (max_position_embeddings=8192, seq_length=2048) and GitHub README ('extend from 2K to over 8K'/Max Length table shows 8K) — confirms native 2K/max 8K (ctxK=8) is correct; an intermediate automated page-summary incorrectly suggested 32K for this model and was rejected in favor of the primary config.json + README evidence. All 4 benchmark scores (mmlu 66.3, c-eval 72.1, gsm8k 61.3, humaneval 32.3) confirmed verbatim on HF/GitHub.
